'''Neeko Payvees''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who had a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] placed on his head by an unknown individual, who referred to him as "worthless scum". He was also the brother of [[Reek Payvees]], who was also considered by the unknown individual to be "worthless scum" and thus had a bounty on his head, too. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], both bounties were claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
